page: Microsoft Azure M624ds_12_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MDSHighMemoryv3 family. It features 624 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 11,400.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 18.27 GB per vCPU. Storage capabilities include a 410 GB local disk, and the instance is premium storage capable. No GPUs are included in this configuration, and there are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the massive memory capacity and high core count, this server represents an extremely high resource density class. The qualitative cost profile reflects its positioning as a specialized, large-scale enterprise resource where the primary tradeoff is the high absolute cost of provisioning such massive memory and compute resources on a single node. The lack of integrated GPUs limits its utility for hardware-accelerated machine learning training, but the massive 11.4 TB RAM allocation makes it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data warehousing workloads that require substantial memory footprints without GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure M624ds_12_v3 is a memory-optimized server from the MDSHighMemoryv3 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 624 dedicated Intel vCPUs and a massive 11,400.0 GB of RAM, providing 18.27 GB of memory per core. The server includes a 410 GB local disk and supports premium storage, though it lacks GPU accelerators and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This high-density hardware profile is designed for massive enterprise workloads. The primary tradeoff is the significant resource commitment required for such a large single-node footprint. It is best suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and data warehousing operations that demand extensive memory capacity and high core counts.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M624ds_12_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 624 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 11,400 GB of RAM, and a 410 GB local disk, designed for massive enterprise database workloads.

tagline: An ultra-high-memory x86_64 server featuring 624 dedicated cores and 11.4 TB of RAM for massive enterprise database workloads.

11,400 GB of system memory providing 18.27 GB per core
410 GB local disk with premium storage capability
No integrated GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERP systems
